events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: HVAC-R field service, thermostats & sequences. Observed condition: no C-wire (power-stealing issues). Work in progress. Need to evaluate procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.

Key issue: No C-wire means thermostat may be relying on power-stealing, causing issues. Before continuing, need to verify wiring, confirm power source, ensure proper common wire or alternative power supply per OEM manual. Sequence violation: working on thermostat/sequence without first addressing power/wiring issue.

Decision: fail because no C-wire is a non-compliant/defective condition that must be resolved before continuing thermostat sequence work. Risk: medium (power-stealing can cause erratic operation, equipment damage). Component condition: installed-defective (thermostat wiring/installation defective).

Actions: install/verify C-wire or use OEM-approved power module, verify voltage, confirm proper power before continuing sequence setup.

Let me produce JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:

"decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 35,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": ["verify-power-source", "confirm-c-wire-or-alternate-power", "verify-thermostat-voltage", "configure-thermostat-sequence", "test-operation"],
  "workable": ["install-c-wire", "install-oem-power-module", "verify-transformer-load"],
  "findings": [
    "No C-wire present; thermostat is relying on power-stealing, which can cause erratic operation and sequence faults",
    "Thermostat sequence work cannot proceed reliably without a confirmed stable 24 VAC common connection or OEM-approved alternate power supply"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop thermostat sequence configuration until power source is resolved",
    "Run or provide a C-wire, or install an OEM-approved power-stealing module/add-a-wire device per manufacturer instructions",
    "Verify 24 VAC between R and C at the thermostat before continuing",
    "Confirm transformer VA capacity is adequate for the added load",
    "Recheck thermostat operation and sequence after stable power is established"
  ],
  "rationale": "Thermostat sequence setup depends on stable power. Without a C-wire, power-stealing can drop voltage and cause reset or erratic cycling, making any sequence verification invalid. OEM manuals require a reliable common connection or approved alternate power before configuration and testing.",
  "references": [
    "mfr manuals - thermostat installation/power requirements",
    "mfr manuals - C-wire / common terminal specifications"
  ]
}
